core_topic.title: MTK 3rd Send USB Hub ISP Event

context_boundaries.core_topic: ## M24 update 前 開啟camera ，update 後 關閉 camera Enter Hub ISP Tool : 6E – 51 – 85 – CD - 03 – F6 – 01 – 01 –CHK Exit Hub ISP Tool : : 6E – 51 – 85 – CD - 03 – F6 – 01 – 00 –CHK ## Z34C Enter Hub ISP Tool : 6E – 51 – 85 – CD - 03 – F6 – 01 – 03 –CHK Exit Hub ISP Tool : : 6E – 51 – 85 – CD - 03 – F6 – 01 – 02 –CHK ## Z24m G3 Enter Hub ISP Tool : 6E – 51 – 85 – CD - 03 – F6 – 01 – 01 –CHK Exit Hub ISP Tool : : 6E – 51 – 85 – CD - 03 – F6 – 01 – 00 –CHK
